aadhaar_card.instructions: Extract the cardholder's name, Aadhaar number, gender, date of birth, father's or husband's name, and address details exactly as printed.

aadhaar_number.description: 12-digit Aadhaar number without spaces or hyphens.

date_of_birth.description: Date of birth in DD/MM/YYYY format if possible.

father_or_husband_name.description: Father's, husband's, or guardian's name if present.

address.description: Full address as printed in English.

district.description: District if identifiable from the address.

city_or_village.description: City, town, or village if identifiable from the address.

pan_card.instructions: Extract the PAN number, cardholder's name, father's name, and date of birth.

pan_number.description: 10-character PAN in the format 5 letters, 4 digits, 1 letter.

date_of_birth.description: Date of birth in DD/MM/YYYY format if possible.

passport.instructions: Extract the passport number, nationality, full name, date of birth, family details, validity dates, place of issue, and address details from the passport bio page.

country_code.description: Issuing country code such as IND.

surname.description: Last name or surname of the holder.

given_name.description: First and middle names of the holder.

date_of_birth.description: Date of birth in DD/MM/YYYY format if possible.

place_of_birth.description: City, state, or country of birth.

address.description: Full printed address of the passport holder.

address_line.description: House, street, village, or PO text not cleanly mapping to the other address fields.

city_or_village.description: City or village name; prefer names explicitly marked VILLAGE or VILL.

district.description: District if explicitly labeled or unambiguous.

cv_bgv.instructions: Extract personal details, addresses, references, identity proofs, and court cases from the CV/background check text.

date_of_birth.description: Date of birth in DD/MM/YYYY format if possible.

criminal_record_declaration.description: True if a criminal offense declaration is positive, false if negative, otherwise null.

current_address.description: Current or present address with complete_address, address_line, city_or_village, district, state, pin_code, period_of_stay, and nature_of_residence.

complete_address.description: Full address string exactly as printed.

address_line.description: House, street, locality, village, or PO text not captured elsewhere.

district.description: District if explicitly labeled or unambiguous.

period_of_stay.description: Start and end period of stay.

nature_of_residence.description: Nature of residence such as Own House, Rental, or PG.

permanent_address.description: Permanent address using the same address structure as current_address.

complete_address.description: Full address string exactly as printed.

address_line.description: House, street, locality, village, or PO text not captured elsewhere.

district.description: District if explicitly labeled or unambiguous.

period_of_stay.description: Start and end period of stay.

nature_of_residence.description: Nature of residence such as Own House, Rental, or PG.

references.description: List of references mentioned in the CV/background check.

acquainted_since.description: Since when the reference knows the candidate.

identity_proofs.description: List of identity proofs mentioned in the CV/background check.

document_type.description: Document type such as Aadhaar, PAN, Driving License, or Passport.

court_cases.description: List of court cases mentioned in the CV/background check.

case_title.description: Case title such as State v. Person.

case_status.description: Status such as Pending or Disposed.

birth_certificate.instructions: Extract the child's name, gender, date of birth, place of birth, family details, registration number, registration office, and office address.

gender.description: Child's gender or sex in English.

date_of_birth.description: Date of birth in DD/MM/YYYY format if possible.

registration_number.description: Birth registration number as printed on the certificate.

registration_office.description: Only the name of the registration office or authority.

registration_office_address.description: Registration office address with address_line, city_or_village, district, state, and pincode.

address_line.description: Building, street, locality, or area text.

city_or_village.description: City, town, or village if identifiable.

district.description: District if explicitly labeled or unambiguous.

driving_licence.instructions: Extract the licence holder details, address, issuing authority, dates, and authorized vehicle classes.

date_of_birth.description: Date of birth in DD/MM/YYYY format if possible.

father_or_guardian_name.description: Father's or guardian's name if present.

state.description: State from the address if identifiable.

date_of_issue.description: Date of issue in DD/MM/YYYY format if possible.

valid_till.description: Validity or expiry date in DD/MM/YYYY format if possible.

vehicle_classes.description: List of vehicle classes or COVs authorized.

items.description: One vehicle class code such as MCWG, LMV, or TRANS.

marriage.instructions: Extract both spouse names, certificate number, marriage date, place of marriage, registrar office, office address, date of registration, and witnesses.

spouse1_name.description: Full name of the first spouse.

spouse2_name.description: Full name of the second spouse.

place_of_marriage.description: Venue, city, or full address where the marriage was solemnized.

registrar_office.description: Only the registrar office or institution name.

date_of_registration.description: Date the document was officially signed or registered.

office_address.description: Registrar office address with address_line, city_or_village, district, state, and pincode.

address_line.description: Building, street, locality, or area text.

city_or_village.description: City, town, or village if identifiable.

district.description: District if explicitly labeled or unambiguous.

witnesses.description: List of witnesses mentioned in the certificate.

employment_certificate.instructions: Extract every employment or experience certificate entry, including company details, candidate name, designation, employee ID, employment period, telephone, and authority name.

certificates.description: One entry per distinct employment or experience certificate.

company_address.description: Company address with address_line, state, city_or_village, pincode, district, and country.

address_line.description: House, street, locality, or village text.

pincode.description: Postal or PIN code if present.

district.description: District if explicitly present or unambiguous.

country.description: Country if outside India or explicitly stated.

internship_certificate.instructions: Extract every internship or training certificate entry, including company details, training location, training period, training program, and nature of training.

certificate.description: One entry per distinct internship or training certificate.

company_address.description: Company address with address_line, state, city_or_village, pincode, district, and country.

address_line.description: House, street, locality, or village text.

pincode.description: Postal or PIN code if present.

district.description: District if explicitly present or unambiguous.

country.description: Country if outside India or explicitly stated.

training_location.description: Separate training or site location if explicitly distinct from the company address.

address_line.description: House, street, locality, or village text.

pincode.description: Postal or PIN code if present.

district.description: District if explicitly present or unambiguous.

country.description: Country if outside India or explicitly stated.

nature_of_training.description: Nature or category of the training.

tenth_marksheet.instructions: Extract the student name, date of birth, parents' names, roll number, registration number, examination passed, exam year, school name, and school address details.

date_of_birth.description: Date of birth in DD/MM/YYYY format if possible.

roll_number.description: Roll or seat number as printed.

registration_number.description: Registration or enrollment number as printed.

examination_passed.description: Name of the examination or certificate.

school_name.description: Only the institution name, not location text.

school_address.description: School address with address_line, city_or_village, district, state, and pincode.

address_line.description: Locality or area text not captured elsewhere.

city_or_village.description: City or village name if identifiable.

district.description: District if explicitly labeled or unambiguous.

twelfth_marksheet.instructions: Extract the student name, parents' names, roll number, registration number, examination passed, exam year, school name, and school address details.

roll_number.description: Roll or seat number as printed.

registration_number.description: Registration or enrollment number as printed.

examination_passed.description: Name of the examination or certificate.

school_name.description: Only the institution name, not location text.

school_address.description: School address with address_line, city_or_village, district, state, and pincode.

address_line.description: Locality or area text not captured elsewhere.

city_or_village.description: City or village name if identifiable.

district.description: District if explicitly labeled or unambiguous.

transfer_certificate.instructions: Extract the student's name, parents' names, date of birth, school name, school address, date of leaving, roll number, and TC number.

date_of_birth.description: Date of birth in DD/MM/YYYY format if possible.

school_name.description: Only the institution name, not location text.

school_address.description: School address with address_line, city_or_village, district, state, and pincode.

address_line.description: Locality or area text not captured elsewhere.

city_or_village.description: City or village name if identifiable.

district.description: District if explicitly labeled or unambiguous.

date_of_leaving.description: Date the student left the school.

roll_number.description: Roll or admission number as printed.

voter_id.instructions: Extract the voter's name, EPIC number, gender, date of birth or age, relation name and type, voter address, assembly constituency, and issue date.

epic_number.description: EPIC number or Voter ID number as printed.

date_of_birth.description: Date of birth or age if printed.

relation_name.description: Father's, mother's, husband's, or guardian's name as printed.

relation_type.description: Relation prefix such as Father, Husband, Mother, or Guardian.

voter_address.description: Voter residential address with address_line, city_or_village, district, state, and pincode.

address_line.description: House, street, locality, or village text not captured elsewhere.

city_or_village.description: City, town, or village name if identifiable.

district.description: District if explicitly labeled or unambiguous.
